native_projects.name: spino
build: env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson setup build-host --wipe --prefix /usr --buildtype=release || env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson setup build-host --prefix /usr --buildtype=release
env -i PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin HOME="$HOME" meson compile -C build-host Spino-1.2.typelib

meson setup build-linux-x86_64 --wipe --prefix "$SQGI_LINUX_PREFIX" --libdir "lib/$SQGI_LINUX_TRIPLET" --buildtype=release ${SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE:+--cross-file "$SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE"} || meson setup build-linux-x86_64 --prefix "$SQGI_LINUX_PREFIX" --libdir "lib/$SQGI_LINUX_TRIPLET" --buildtype=release ${SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE:+--cross-file "$SQGI_LINUX_MESON_CROSS_FILE"}
